message:
fix(glamour): Table spacing matches Go implementation

- Fixed table column width/spacing discrepancy with Go glamour
- Document margin (2 spaces) is applied POST-rendering to all lines
- Table flush_table() now uses relative spacing instead of absolute:
  - Blank styled line: 0 extra spaces (margin provides 2)
  - Header row: 1 space (margin + 1 = 3 total)
  - Separator: 0 extra spaces (margin provides 2)
  - Data rows: 1 space (margin + 1 = 3 total)
- Added unit test test_table_spacing_matches_go confirming correct structure
- Closed charmed_rust-6ew (table event analysis)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
